topics.name: axes
topics.description: Current normalized stick and trigger positions from the selected gamepad, after the deadzone is applied.

topics.name: buttons
topics.description: Current pressed state of every button on the gamepad.

topics.name: cmd_vel
topics.description: Velocity command derived from the sticks. Shape depends on output_mode — diff_drive fills only linear.x + angular.z; 6dof maps all four sticks plus shoulder/trigger buttons across the full Twist.

poll_rate_hz.label: Poll Rate
poll_rate_hz.description: How often to poll the gamepad.

max_linear_speed.label: Max Linear Speed
max_linear_speed.description: Maximum forward/backward speed for cmd_vel output.

max_angular_speed.label: Max Angular Speed
max_angular_speed.description: Maximum turning rate for cmd_vel output. Used only in 6dof mode; in diff_drive (tank) mode angular.z is derived from max_linear_speed and wheel_separation.

wheel_separation.label: Wheel Separation
wheel_separation.description: Distance between left and right wheels. Used only in diff_drive (tank) mode. Must match the Differential Drive node's wheel_separation.

output_mode.label: cmd_vel Mapping
output_mode.description: diff_drive fills only linear.x + angular.z (for differential-drive bases). 6dof maps all four sticks plus shoulder/trigger buttons across the full Twist (for pose-controlled arms / IK).
